[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000001 1
1 000010000 1
2 000010000 1
3 000000100 1
4 001001001 3
5 000010011 3
6 010010000 2
7 000110100 3

01 10 000001001 2
12 21 000000000 a
23 32 000010000 1 match 1 2
34 43 000110100 3 match 7
45 54 010100000 2
56 65 000000001 1 match 0
67 76 000010000 1 match 1 2
70 07 000000000 a

02 20 001000000 1
13 31 000001000 1
24 42 010010000 2 match 6
35 53 000100000 1
46 64 000010010 2
57 75 010000000 1
60 06 000000001 1 match 0
71 17 000000000 a

03 30 000001100 2
14 41 100000010 2
25 52 011000000 2
36 63 000010000 1 match 1 2
47 74 010010000 2 match 6
50 05 001000001 2
61 16 000000011 2
72 27 010010000 2 match 6

04 40 000000100 1 match 3
15 51 000000001 1 match 0
26 62 000010000 1 match 1 2
37 73 000010000 1 match 1 2
